description: Create a custom HTML dashboard at /home/ga/Documents/meeting_portal.html that embeds a Jitsi Meet conference room for 'WeeklyOpsReview' using the IFrame External API (Domain: localhost:8080, Script: http://localhost:8080/external_api.js). The meeting must be contained in a div with id 'jitsi-container' with dimensions 100% width and 700px height. Configure the meeting options to start with audio and video muted, set the subject to 'Weekly Operations Review - Q4 Planning', and set the user display name to 'Operations Manager'. Open the resulting file in Firefox to verify the dashboard.
